---
title: 'Code 1: Inidividual Radiocarbon Calibration and Correction'
author: "Bryan Rodriguez"
date: "2026-03-25"
output: html_document
---

***Disclaimer: This code was designed by Bryan Rodriguez-Colon with the help of chatGPT-5.***


```{r}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)

rm(list = ls())
#setwd('/Users/bryanrodriguez/Library/Mobile Documents/com~apple~CloudDocs/PhD-PROJECT/R-codes/PRGeobio_XR_C14_StableIsotopes_Codes/RadioCarbon_Codes')
```


```{r}
library(IntCal) #For radiocarbon calibration.
library(rbacon) #For age-modeling.
library(clam)
library(coffee)
library(ggplot2)
library(ggsci)
library(RColorBrewer)
library(plotly)
library(dplyr)
library(tibble)
library(purrr)
library(ggpubr)
library(lubridate)
library(patchwork)
library(baseline)
library(EEM)
library(data.table)
library(tidyverse)
library(conflicted)
library(stringr)
library(svglite)
library(ragg)
```
